This is a collection of articles about Liero, LieroX and OpenLieroX.

== Liero reviews ==
TIGSource (independent gaming news) with a side note about OpenLieroX: <http://tigsource.com/articles/2008/05/14/multiplayer-on-one-keyboard-6-lier-um-yeah>

Powermagazine: <http://powermagazine.liero.be/>

== OpenLieroX reviews ==
LinuxTidBits: <http://linuxtidbits.wordpress.com/2008/03/31/upcoming-games-openlierox/>

nice history about OpenLieroX: <http://www.lanthrax.com/news_details.asp?NewsID=01381>

BigDownload / GameDaily: <http://news.bigdownload.com/2009/09/04/freeware-friday-openlierox/>

small review of OpenLieroX in Powermagazine: <http://powermagazine.liero.be/2007-POWER-7.pdf>

one of the most respected Linux magazine in CZ about OLX (about OLX itself, not refered to Liero): <http://www.root.cz/clanky/openlierox-nebezpecni-cervici/>

== Other references ==
Jason Boettchers LieroX source code release: <http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=28565>

Ohloh OpenLieroX code analysis: <https://www.ohloh.net/p/openlierox/analyses/latest>

== Part of collections ==
Liero, LieroX or OpenLieroX are often noted in some overview about a collections of games.

Open Source Worms Clones overview with OpenLieroX: <http://techwoo.com/open-source-artillery-worms-clones/>

== Game dictionaries ==
Some game dictionary entries are notable. Note that this is not meant as a complete list, just some noteable entries should be listed here.

LinuxLinks: <http://www.linuxlinks.com/article/20080524122016281/OpenLieroX.html>

== Hackontest ==
Hackontest was a coding contest in 2008 where OpenLieroX took part.

short German summary with results by netzwoche: <http://www.netzwoche.ch/News/NWTickerHeadlinesDetail.aspx?Id=34462&Date=29.09.2008&Digest=hD71yU1Qc1+3d9nn95W9YQ&AspxAutoDetectCookieSupport=1>

some pictures and a video: <http://www.etoy.com/blog/archive/2008/09/26/hackontest.html>

Bruce Perens summary: <http://technocrat.net/d/2008/9/25/50176/>

German summary about OpenExpo: <http://www.openexpo.ch/openexpo-2008-zuerich/presse/>

very short German summary: <http://www.swissitmagazine.ch/software/backend-sw/articles/164817/?icmp=aut-artikel-artikel>

[[Category:Liero Xtreme Community]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130331062209/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Articles -->
